decisions: Front-squat strength deferred to class — Performance/WL squats heavy Mon/Wed/Sat. No competing barbell front squat; substituted low-CNS quad/knee support on Tue (the engine/pulling day).
Strict press kept as the protected independent lift (the box under-supplies pressing) — placed Thu AM: fresh, a gymnastics day (no press clash), and clear of Tue's Push Press.
Ring MU skill placed Mon/Wed/Sat for frequency (neurologically cheap). It is the first thing to flex if a day gets squeezed — strength is never cut for skill.
Triage if time/energy is short: PROTECT top sets → Performance class → quad/knee accessory → ring-MU skill.

streams.label: Weightlifting
streams.text:
Week 8 of the Cycle

(0 - 18 min)
A. Back Squat: 6s x 2r x 87.5%

(18 - 32 min)
B. Low Hang Power Clean:
3 Waves: (3 sets of each)
2 x 80%
1 x 90%
*After each set complete 3 rebounding vertical jumps.

streams.label: Performance
streams.text:
A. 4 Rounds: alt OT90 sec
A1. 5 Back Rack Step Ups (e side)
*Set a box so you're below parallel
A2. 30m Single Arm DB OH Walk

B. For time:
50 Deadlifts
50 Box Jumps (24/20")
25 Strict handstand Push Ups
50/40 Calorie Echo Bike
50 Front Squat
Barbell: (60/40kg)
*17.30 time cap
Workout is done in the format of 90 sec on, 30 sec off until reps are completed.

streams.label: Ring MU
streams.text:
False-grip ring pull-ups: 4 x 4
Low-ring transitions (feet assist, minimal): 5 x 3
Kip swing to high pull (sternum to rings): 5 x 4
Eccentric lower from support: 4 x 3
*Chase frequency, not load. → references/drills/ring-mu-kipping.md

streams.label: Performance
streams.text:
A. 20 min AMRAP:
3 Rounds:
400m Run
15 Pull Ups
- into -
2 Rounds:
300m Run
10 Chest to Bar Pull Ups
- into -
AMRAP in remaining time:
200m Run
5 Bar Muscle Ups

(32 - 45 min)
Push Press:
5 x 75%
4 x 80%
3 x 85%
5+ x 75%

B. 21 min: alt OTM x 10 mins:
M1: 30 sec hanging Tuck Hold
M2: 5-10 Seated Straddle Leg Lifts

*If you're able to do after, or in between your Push Press:
Glute Ham Raises: 3 x 10
*Use a band if you can't do 10 BW

streams.label: Comp Extra's
streams.text:
A. 3 Rounds for quality:
40 sec S Leg Sorensen Hold (e side)
20 sec GHD Side Plank (e side)
20 Back Extensions
20 Bent Knee S Leg Heel Raise (e side)

B. Front Squat Dips: Build to a heavy 3, then 5 x 2 x 80% of that

streams.label: Quad / knee
streams.text:
Spanish squat (banded): 3 x 20-30s isometric holds
ATG split squat (BW → goblet): 3 x 8/leg, controlled full depth
Zombie front squat: 3 x 5 (front-rack + quad bias)
Tibialis raises: 3 x 15
*Low-CNS support — class supplies the heavy squat this week. → references/drills/knee-rehab.md

streams.label: Weightlifting
streams.text:
(0 - 18 min)
Front Squat:
5s x 3r x 87.5%

Power Snatch:
(18 - 32 min)
5s x 1r x 85-90% of your 1RM

(32 - 40 min)
Build to a 3RM

(40 - 45 min)
Snatch Pull:
3 x 3 x 120%

streams.label: Performance
streams.text:
A. 4 Rounds OT2M:
A1. 8-10 Kickstand RDLs (e side)
A2. 5 Banded Zercher Jumps + 10 Back to Wall Cross Legged Shoulder Slides

B. For total time
Every 1:00 x 4 sets:
15/12 Calorie Row

Every 2:00 x 3 sets:
30/24 Calorie Row

Every 3:00 x 2 sets:
40/32 Calorie Row

Every 4:00 x 1 sets:
50/40 Calorie Row

*Advised to just do part A and then some mobility if you're doing Weightlifting.
*Today's WOD optional. If your muscle ups need work it's reccommended.

streams.label: Ring MU
streams.text:
False-grip ring pull-ups: 4 x 4
Low-ring transitions (feet assist, minimal): 5 x 3
Kip swing to high pull (sternum to rings): 5 x 4
Eccentric lower from support: 4 x 3
*Chase frequency, not load. → references/drills/ring-mu-kipping.md

streams.label: Strict Press
streams.text:
Top single @ RPE 8, then 3 x 5 @ 75%
Strict HSPU progression (deficit / negatives): 4 x 4
Half-kneeling DB press: 3 x 8/arm (overhead stability)
*PROTECT — the box under-supplies pressing; this is priority #1 this week.

streams.label: WOD
streams.text:
A. Gymnastics Cycle Week 1 – Bar Series
1/4: Straight Arm Pulling: Ball Up, Front Lever Inverted Hang & Kip Extensions

B. 16 Min AMRAP:
2 Kip Extensions
4 Ball Ups
6 Candlesticks to Rolling Squat
8 Side Lying Thoracic Rotation Press (e side)
1 Up and Back Parallette Traverse

streams.label: Comp Class
streams.text:
A. (If you are doing tomorrow's WOD make up some missed WL or Tuesday accessories from the week here)

0 - 7 mins:
Weighted Pull Ups: 6 sets of 4 at 20% of your 1RM
*If you don't have a Weighted Pull Up:
OTM x 7 mins: Tough Chin over bar Hold + Slow lower.
If holding chin over the bar is tough, use a band.

8 - 16 min:
8 min: Max unbroken BW set
11, 12, 13, 14, 15 min: 50% of that max unbroken set:
*If you don't have 5+ unbroken at BW:
8 min: 8-12 Banded Pull Ups (to failure)
11, 12, 13, 14, 15 min: 50% of that max unbroken set:

B. In Pairs:
10 Rounds for time:
10 Toes to Bar (Sync)
10 Burpee Box Get over (48")
15m Handstand Walk
*Apart from T2B, one person working at a time
*25 min time cap

streams.label: Weightlifting
streams.text:
(0 - 20 min)
Front Squat: 2 x 70%, 77.5%, 82.5%, 87.5%, 92.5%, 97.5%

(20 - 38 min)
Split Jerk: 5s x 2r x 85%

(45 - 55 min)
Snatch & Clean
10 sets OTM;
At the start of the minute complete a full Snatch
At the 30 second mark complete a full Clean
*This is at 70% of your 1RM Snatch. Precision and speed is the focus here.

(57 - 75 min)
4 Rounds, alt every 90 seconds
E1: 2 barbell Z Press
E2: 8 Prone barbell Rows
E3: 12 Weighted GHD Hip Extensions
*First set moderate, second set tough, third and fourth sets should be close to failure.

streams.label: Performance
streams.text:
In Pairs: 10 Rounds for time:
300m Run
16 DB Walking Lunges (22.5/15kg)
5 Strict Handstand Push Ups
*Alternate working partner after each movement
*30 min time cap

- 2 min rest -

Max Calorie Ski Erg until the 30 min mark.

streams.label: Ring MU
streams.text:
False-grip ring pull-ups: 4 x 4
Low-ring transitions (feet assist, minimal): 5 x 3
Kip swing to high pull (sternum to rings): 5 x 4
Eccentric lower from support: 4 x 3
*Chase frequency, not load. → references/drills/ring-mu-kipping.md
